summary: Remove sidebar nav strip except Files
description: User explicitly wants Today, Timeline, Entities, Projects, and Detail removed from the Mega Vault Viewer sidebar. Remove the command-nav strip rather than restyling it; keep the sidebar focused on query search and the file list.
acceptance: Sidebar no longer renders Today, Timeline, Entities, Projects, or Detail navigation buttons/text; no command-nav strip remains; Files list remains accessible by default; app still builds and browser smoke proves removed labels absent.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Removed sidebar command navigation strip instead of restyling it. Deleted PrimaryView state, data-primary-view handlers, renderPrimaryNavigation/renderPrimaryTab, Today/Timeline/Entities/Projects/Detail branch renderers, and dead command-nav CSS. Sidebar now renders Query directly followed by Files tabs. Browser proof: blank=false, commandNav=false, primaryTabCount=0, sidebarHasBanned=[], fileViewer=true, fileTabs=[Folders,Newest,Recent]. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; go validate; browser vision smoke.
